Summarize the causes and key events of the French Revolution.

The French Revolution (1789-1799) was caused by fiscal crisis, social inequality, and Enlightenment ideas. Key events include the Storming of the Bastille (July 14, 1789), the Declaration of the Rights of Man, the Reign of Terror, and Napoleon's rise to power.

Answer: Summarize the causes and key events of the French Revolution.
